title: Trust In Immortality.
content:
The dead has risen here, to live through endless ages;
     This I with firmness trust and know.
    I was first led to guess it by the sages,
     The knaves convince me that 'tis really so.
meaning:
"Trust In Immortality." is a quintessential example of Friedrich Schiller's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
